title: Mission plan with live geofence check
thesis: A counter-UAS ISR mission must respect FAA TFR + NPS no-fly + 5nm airport boundaries; the plan is signed and replayable.
script: Plan a passive ISR mission for own-fleet drone toward an objective. Each waypoint is checked against active geofence zones; breaching legs re-route to the nearest legal vertex; PURIQ F7 scores feasibility; the final plan is Wire-D signed.
expected_output: Plan with ordered legs, F7 feasibility, geofence_status per leg, and a signed receipt (keyid szlholdings-cosign).
fallback: Use a pre-computed plan object + its stored signed receipt; verify offline via /khipu/pubkey.
disclaimer: WE SENSE. WE EVIDENCE. WE DO NOT JACK INTO THIRD-PARTY DRONES. Passive sensing + evidence only; offensive action is the lawful customer's responsibility. See /api/killinchu/v2/legal.
